_comment_boundaries: Files where splitting would break a load-bearing project invariant. Filled from CLAUDE.md § Hard Requirements / Architecture during bootstrap.
_comment_keep_rules: Files that always KEEP regardless of length. Use sparingly — for generated code, vendored third-party, etc.
_comment_physics_floor: Plain English: smallest residual that matters. The synthesis step uses this to filter false-positive precision claims. If the project has no domain physics, set value to 'no floor; report any drift'.
_comment_verification_command: How to confirm a proposed change is behavior-neutral. e2e_baseline gets propagated into thread proposals.
_comment_risk_classifier: Three buckets, free-form lists. The synthesis step matches a finding's recommendation against these to assign a risk.

medium: method >100 lines refactored to private helpers
high: modifies the canonical e2e test or its baseline

_comment_lens_overrides: Per-lens project-specific tweaks: extra grep terms, extra anti-patterns. Most useful for duplicate-helper and naming-drift in domain projects.
_comment_thread_worthy_threshold: When the synthesis step recommends propose-thread vs direct commits.
_comment_models: Sub-agent models. Default haiku; opt in to sonnet per lens. Never opus (synthesis is the only opus-grade work, and that's main-session).
